overridableConfigKeys.label: First Term
overridableConfigKeys.description: The first term a₀ of the arithmetic sequence; the marker term is recomputed as a₀ + n·d.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Curves
overridableConfigKeys.description: The connecting line through every term in data coordinates; its constant slope is the common difference d.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Common Difference
overridableConfigKeys.description: The constant step d between consecutive terms; a straight line of dots makes it visible as slope.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Points
overridableConfigKeys.description: The nine static term dots {x:n, y:a₀+n·d} in data coordinates; the sweeping marker highlights the current one.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Running
overridableConfigKeys.description: When true the tick sweeps the highlighted marker term-by-term along the sequence; toggle to start/pause.

paramsSchema.description: Typed params for learning-math / ArithmeticSequenceOrbital. Empty {} = factory defaults.

entityName.description: PascalCase singular entity rename (e.g. "Listing", "Member"). Renames the DOMAIN concept and rewrites every `@Entity.*` reference. Use this when the user wants to rename the THING, not where it's stored.

pagePath.description: URL path override for the orbital's first page.

fields.description: Extra entity fields appended to the canonical entity. Caller wins on name collision.

relation.description: Relation target. `cardinality: "one"` for FK (customerId → one Customer); "many" for collection (tags → many Tag).

traitOverrides.description: Per-trait knob overrides keyed on the canonical trait name. Each value can include `config` (knob values), `linkedEntity` (rebind), `events` (per-key rename map), `listens` (cross-orbital subscriptions), `emitsScope` (`internal` keeps emits local; `external` lets sibling orbitals listen), and `name` (rename the inlined trait). Only the traits + knobs shown here are valid — the schema rejects unknown keys.

a0.description: The first term a₀ of the arithmetic sequence; the marker term is recomputed as a₀ + n·d.

curves.description: The connecting line through every term in data coordinates; its constant slope is the common difference d.

d.description: The constant step d between consecutive terms; a straight line of dots makes it visible as slope.

points.description: The nine static term dots {x:n, y:a₀+n·d} in data coordinates; the sweeping marker highlights the current one.

running.description: When true the tick sweeps the highlighted marker term-by-term along the sequence; toggle to start/pause.

linkedEntity.description: Rebind this trait to a different entity in the organism (rewrites every @entity.* / ref / fetch / persist binding inside it).

name.description: Rename the inlined trait at the call site. Does NOT change topology — just the trait's local name.

events.description: Per-key event rename map (e.g. `{ "OPEN": "ADD_ITEM" }`). Rewrites the events array, transition triggers, emit/listen event keys, and `["emit", X]` SExpression literals inside the trait.

event.description: Event key to subscribe to (bare name, no orbital prefix).

triggers.description: Local state-machine event fired when the subscription matches.

scope.description: `internal` = same-orbital events. `external` = events from sibling orbitals (use this for cross-orbital reactivity).

listens.description: Replace this trait's `listens` entirely. Empty array clears upstream listeners. For cross-orbital reactivity, add an entry with `scope: "external"` matching the source orbital's emit event.

emitsScope.description: `internal` = emits stay local to this orbital. `external` = sibling orbitals can listen. Set to `external` when another orbital needs to react to this trait's events (counter updates, list refreshes, badges, etc.).

extraTraits.description: Sibling traits to compose beyond the factory-authored stack.

name.description: Optional rename of the inlined trait.

pages.description: Per-page overrides keyed by canonical page name.

name.description: Canonical page name from the orbital.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Curves
overridableConfigKeys.description: Initial pair of lines in data coordinates: A through (-3,-2), B through (3,2).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Line B Slope
overridableConfigKeys.description: Fixed slope of line B through data point (3,2); line A's slope animates and the intersection tracks it.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Points
overridableConfigKeys.description: Initial intersection point of the two lines in data coordinates.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Running
overridableConfigKeys.description: When true the tick animates line A's slope and recomputes the intersection; toggle to start/pause.

paramsSchema.description: Typed params for learning-math / LinearSystemsOrbital. Empty {} = factory defaults.

entityName.description: PascalCase singular entity rename (e.g. "Listing", "Member"). Renames the DOMAIN concept and rewrites every `@Entity.*` reference. Use this when the user wants to rename the THING, not where it's stored.

pagePath.description: URL path override for the orbital's first page.

fields.description: Extra entity fields appended to the canonical entity. Caller wins on name collision.

relation.description: Relation target. `cardinality: "one"` for FK (customerId → one Customer); "many" for collection (tags → many Tag).

Each value can include `config` (knob values), `linkedEntity` (rebind), `events` (per-key rename map), `listens` (cross-orbital subscriptions), `emitsScope` (`internal` keeps emits local; `external` lets sibling orbitals listen), and `name` (rename the inlined trait). Only the traits + knobs shown here are valid — the schema rejects unknown keys.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Curves
overridableConfigKeys.description: The number line itself: a single horizontal segment along y=0 from x=-9 to x=9 in data coordinates.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Points
overridableConfigKeys.description: 19 gray integer tick dots along y=0 plus one bold red marker 'n' that hops between them each tick.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Running
overridableConfigKeys.description: When true the tick advances the phase and hops the marker to the next integer; toggle to start/pause.
